productDisplayName: Clarks Women Arizona Heat Leather Silver Shoes
description: clarks have combined quality, classic elegance and iconic ideas to create a sophisticated version of the ballet shoe, perfect for the woman who wants to express her femininity while projecting a fashionable image to the world.  You can rely on Clarks to provide a shoe which will take care of your feet, giving comfort, good quality and a great British eye for style. Pair this with slim formal trousers and a breezy ruffled shirt.UpperLeather upper with a bow on the toe boxPadded inner and footbedFabric piping along the mouthOutsole reinforced onto the upper at the heel to act as a heel guardOutsoleOne piece TPU outsole with flex grooves and dotted points all overShoe careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
